channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Is it worse to be a wagie or a NEET? — 167 replies — 155.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
Is it worse to be a wagie or a NEET?

Open thread • Replies: 167 • Updated: 2026-05-01 13:02 UTC

OP

Is it worse to be a wagie or a NEET?

Early replies (first 3)

62158601
>>62158557
Neet
Wagie can get some money to go out and have fun, and socialize.
might not be your cup of tea, until you making out with a 8/10 girl who you just said hi to, 2 minutes ago

62158623
>>62158601
>might not be your cup of tea, until you making out with a 8/10 girl who you just said hi to, 2 minutes ago

while waging at walmart is impossible

62158626
>>62158557
I prefer to be a neet, but ofc neither situation is perfect. Now if i was getting pussy then we'd be talking

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62167389
>>62167147
https://reddit.com/r/NEET/comments/ifcblr/today_i_became_a_40_year_old_virgin_neet_some/

62167410
>>62158557

62167440
>>62158601
>Wagie can get some money to go out and have fun, and socialize.


You're a robot born to entertain themselves to death while feeding the capitalist system. You're less than human

62167526
>>62167025
read my first post itt, i was a neet for 3 years

62167534
>>62167526
I have been neet my whole life. How about you?

62167920
>>62167534
>I have been neet my whole life.
That's just called being a woman.

62168012
>>62166519
No

62168184
really both suck. having something to do that you truly love its all that matter.

62168378
>>62158601
>might not be your cup of tea, until you making out with a 8/10 girl who you just said hi to, 2 minutes ago
Same woman has sucked a stranger's dick 10 minutes before she met you.

62168687
>>62158601
Lamo I had no idea I can cause this much seethe looooool
>>62168378
Nah, you say that cause you don’t wanna try.
>>62167440
Less than a human? You really think you use the gift of consciousness better, sitting at home, afraid to challenge yourself?
>>62160048
>humiliation ritual
And you think it’s not for everyone else? You really think everyone goes out and have crazy fun? Dude I seen guys who try and fail. Hell I try and fail every night, but that’s a thing about me. I am insane. Even when it fails, you try again. Until it works.
I think some people just deathly afraid of failing
Shit I WANTED to fail, cause failing would have been the proof that “I didn’t try, because it wouldn’t have work anyway, and being a neet was always better” but then it proved me wrong, that life can be fucking fun and easy at that, and I wasted YEARS, not having fun, not going out, not enjoying my life, listening and being tricked by social media to not even try.
I am almost 32, and my best years are gone being a loser neet who was afraid of trial and failure.

62168693
>>62158666
lol i got a great pc as a neet, you just didnt do it right

62168700
>>62168693
>>62163185
Dude, the amount of shit you can do on a super good pc is astronomical in comparison to a deck.
Ck3, and stellaris are cpu intensive specially in mid to late game cause of massive population boost all over the map, and I got myself a 5k computer to experiance all the glory of it, all my favorite mods available.
>>62159483
Yeah? Maybe. But just imagine this, the amount of motivation you will have, when a girl you just saw is now CRAZY into you, to the point of saying she loved you, keep trying to makeout with you, is just all over you, and then you realize oh no, I don’t have my own place, oh no, I got no money for a hotel, etc
You see what I am picturing here? I mean fuck, I wanna experience shit like that again and fully, and for that I need decent clothes and later a place of my own. a 8/10 moaning into your about ear how much she wants you, how much she loves and needs you, while you don’t have your place is the greatest motivator you can have in life, and if you want that motivation, you need to start waging a bit, so you can at least afford to go out and experience that massive boost of motivation.
Oh and guess how much porn I watched since it happened despite coming home blue balled and pissed? ZERO!
It’s a fucking testosterone shot straight into your brain that wakes you up to what a fucking lie you been living!
Social media lied and fucked me up, despite me not even having an Instagram, YouTube bullshit got me.
Don’t repeat my mistakes, and wake up wishing you didn’t do the shits I did (or didn’t)
I fucking WISH that world rejected me but instead it fucked me up by showing me how wrong I was.

62169232
>>62159483
better than she having you wait while fucking every other dude on a first date

62169261
>>62158666
Skill issue, Satan. There's much fun to be had for free.

62169348
>>62167534
>I only have one perspective so my perspective is right
Great now I know not to take your opinion seriously.

62169412
>>62158557
It's worse to be a wagie, obviously. Why would anyone ever think being NEET is worse? The whole point of working is to save up enough money to be NEET someday.

62169467
>>62169412
Yes and waging gets you more money and expedites that process so you can eventually neet. If you go neet mode with no money you're just suffering and can't truly enjoy life, and the "enjoyment" you have is just consuming media which makes you as much of a goy as a wagie.

62169540
>>62159267
Kierkegaard was based Dane, like Schacht.

62170345
>>62158557
depends on your situation. neet is better when you can actually afford it. if you need money then having a job is better no matter how soul crushing it is most of the time.

62170481
>>62159382
At least you know what checked actually means unlike that other dude.
But honestly man, why would my view be goyish? I am just saying biology will motivate you in life aka a hot woman
>>62169232
Fuck yeah dude. A hot woman keep saying I love you while pulling your hair, moaning and can’t stop herself from kissing you? Yeah I don’t care what she did with who before at that moment
>>62169261
Bro I had a one full terabyte of Skyrim and it’s mod enable on my shit laptop and was playing it without issue, so I have no trouble going around my laptop limitation. I could entertain myself with two absolutly simple games like xcom piretez or dominion 6 (both that I loved) then when I got bored I would used chatgpt to make assets and modded the game to my taste myself and started over, so no, I know how to not get bored either.
Problem is that a shit laptop is just not able to handle all the calculation of ck3 or stellaris (thanks to paradox shit programming) and total war had to be played on low settings.
I don’t like that shit. I don’t wanna be limited like this. Why would I limit myself to some fake and not my favorite, while I can go work, make some money, and get a pc that can handle ALL MY GAMES?
>>62169467
Yep. A smart wagie is a free man.
my problem with being a neet was always lack of safety net, but a wagie has that and he can get out of rat race faster.
>>62169412
Sure, we all love to be neet. But being a retired YOUNG neet, with money and your own car and place, is hard fucking work. (Or luck)
You can either sit on your ass and wish to be like that, have a good luck in lotto or stocks or crypto or work your ass and wage. In the end, the wagie gonna win, because he got more money to dump into stocks and crypto while a neet doesnt.
And god, I fucking WISHED I had my own place right now dude.

62170488
>>62170481
It’s still me, I don’t know why my id keep changing, probably cause I am a phonefag posting at work

62170497
Either has their pros and cons. Waging can get enraging and demoralizing but is a wonderful source of social, schedule, productivity, and income. Neeting has freedom and self-expression but can get so isolating and repetitive that it can make you break down mentally entirely over time.

Neeting and waging are two sides of the same coin. Balance in all things and you will find peace.

62171998
>>62158557
NEETs have dignity.

62175198
>>62158601
Skill issue. I'm working on become turboneet through three sources and will clear 93-95k when they are approved.

62175347
>>62170481
>>62170345
Almost everyone that owns a house in a top tier city came from well off families. I don’t think the majority truly realize how important family help is and how big the wealth gap is.
Good houses in good areas are truly unaffordable for normal or people in the bottom 95%.

62175361
>>62170497
> Either has their pros and cons. Waging can get enraging and demoralizing but is a wonderful source of social, schedule, productivity, and income. Neeting has freedom and self-expression but can get so isolating and repetitive that it can make you break down mentally entirely over time.
There is nothing productive about waking up at 6am everyday. Neet is a choice but waging isn’t. I think this is what no one wants to say. No one working would choose to work if they didn’t have to work.

62175389
>>62158557
Diogenes, Buddha and Jesus was Neets
nobody remembers the trillions of wagies
being a wagie is worser than being a neet

62175537
>>62167410
the real best of both worlds is WFH wagie
>forced into a regular wake up schedule that isn’t obscenely early or late
>no commute
>less oversight allows you to better enjoy the downtime inherent to any job, without giving you so much free time as to burn out media quickly
>access to your own kitchen during breaks and all the wagie bucks to buy good ingredients
>once again no commute, allowing you to instantly switch to leisure the moment the workday is done

62176675
>>62168012
https://soul-zone.org/

62177246
>>62158601
40 years ago maybe

item.title: The LINK token has value — 38 replies — 152.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
The LINK token has value

Open thread • Replies: 38 • Updated: 2026-05-01 13:58 UTC

OP

The LINK token has value

Early replies (first 3)

62176216
New Chainlink report
https://bitwiseinvestments.com/crypto-market-insights/chainlink-in-plain-english

62176226
>>62176214
>In many cases, nodes must stake LINK before they can provide and be compensated for their services. If they provide incorrect data, they are penalized and lose a portion of the LINK they have staked. This system helps ensure the integrity of Chainlink’s services while also
reducing the free-floating supply of LINK.
Speaking in present tense. I assume this and the and the other clues we've seen in the past couple weeks mean staking imminent?

62176244
>>62176226
What other clues

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62176298
>>62176295
>muh clarity
only level of opacity going on is an extremely low, sludge based one stinkie.

62176303
>>62176295
>Artemis
anon just stop

62176320
>>62176303
artemis's posts align perfectly with Chainlink posts

62176323
>>62176284
cuckoldry from watching Chainlink make all these new and returning partnerships with big enterprise companies?

62176330
>>62176320
Did you forget his last post was hyping up nothing
>>62029230

62176331
>>62176214
But the switch hasn’t been flipped yet. The coin isn’t accumulating enough value, all value is speculation that one day it will

62176333
>>62176330
the next day they announced progress on Clarity Act

62176334
>>62176279
Institutions can already legally buy Link tokens if they in fact wanted to, according to CLL. Link ETFs were DoA. Link Grayscale was a flop. Its fucking over.

62176335
>>62176333

62176336
>>62176334

62176344
>>62176323
>MUH PARTNERSHIPS MUH PARTNERSHIPS MUH PARTNERSHIPS
stupid ass stinkbatt
nobody cares
you lost the game (of life)

62176350
>>62176335
lol February

62176364
>>62176214
yeah about $5

62176404
>>62176214
An interesting read, but has bitwise ever released similar whitepapers for other tokens? They usually do quarterly reports but I'd be curious to see if they've been this bullish on other shit in the past. I still gotta read the paper and browse their site a lot more. Thank you for sharing OP

62176409
Holy shit I'm so fucking tired of waging, shut the fuck up and pump to $1000 already.

62176415
>>62176409
oh stinkie
who do you thinks gonna buy link at $10? $50? $100? $500? will it be losers like you? are you sure there is enough cash in all the losers of the world to pump the price to heckin a thousand USD?
face it stinkie: you lost the game of crypto, finance, and ultimately life itself

62176418
>>62176415
Don't reply to me ever again ranjeesh.

62176477
do stinkies even understand that pain and misery are LITERALLY their only friends

62176567
>saaars do not listen to the fuddergods, link token has value ssars! link token needed! do not redeem!

kek, who has ever even ehard of the bitwise

62176598
>>62176477
You’ve been posting here multiple times a day using the same formula for over a year. The style is played out. Aren’t you bored? Clearly you’re not very smart or inspired. You’re not dissuading the newfag or making anyone sell, so what are you doing? All you’re doing is showing the world how pathetic you are. Try something new, I promise it will feel good.

62176740
Is it march already? Weren't we supposed to be pumping in march???

62176756
I'm just going to hold until all tokens are distributed. Is that okay with you?

62176892
>>62176477
Welcome to another Chainlink thread
Be nice!

62176910
>>62176284
I dumped LINK and I moved into BTC. I started staking some recently and might start lending too with TBV now becoming more relevant. Will I make it with just BTC?

62176913
>>62176910
will you make it if what you're holding does a 2x?

62176989
>>62176914
What date is this video from?

62177088
>>62176295
Shartemis betray

62177113
>>62176284
>>62176298
>>62176344
>>62176415
>>62176477

62177436
>>62176989
2025. In the video they're expecting good things from 2026

item.title: I F U C KING SUFFER IN DENVER REEEEEEEEEE — 42 replies — 58.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
I F U C KING SUFFER IN DENVER REEEEEEEEEE

Open thread • Replies: 42 • Updated: 2026-05-01 13:23 UTC

OP

I F U C KING SUFFER IN DENVER
REEEEEEEEEE

Early replies (first 3)

62173936
>>62173926
Trust the plan goy

62173941
>>62173926
gas in california is over $6 right now, you have it easy all things considered

62174058
>>62173926
Its 9.35 in Germany if you calculate it in your weird metric. But the median net salary is only 40k dollar for ful time work.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62174544
>>62174259
Really sad I passed up the 4.17 I saw yesterday
Where's that jackass who said it was only $4 and that wasn't even that bad?

62174560
>>62174252
I’m not driving all the way to Arvada for gas faggot

62174600
>>62173926
That's half what we pay in Europe normally.

62174944
>>62174544
>only $4
It's only $3.39 though. Not sure what you're griping about, this is a literal nothingburger.
>passed up 4.17 yesterday
Lol. You voted for those gasoline taxes. You voted for those environmental regulations. You voted to shut down those fracking rigs. You voted against those pipelines. You voted to close those refineries. You did this to yourself. Now you get to lay back and enjoy the fruits of your labors. So quit your bitching, you little faggot.

62174951
>>62174944
What part of Texas is in Indiana, buddy?

62174963
You guys are almost paying California prices. It's 5.09 here right now.

62174977
>>62174944
>texas
creo tu eres un joto.

62174998
>>62173926
I voted for this

62175538
>>62174118
Yes it's very vibrant and uhm dark
>>62174126
Well not me

62175544
this is just the beginning, and this is why the current stock valuation is tarded. just wait

62175608
>>62173926
>Dinosaur in logo
"Fossil fuels"(LOL) Yes, goy, thissss oil is preciousssss

62175657
>>62174058
It's 10.33 in Israel.

62175885
>>62174944
All this effort for the most retarded post I’ve seen this week. Bravo

62175898
Good.
Let the wealth gap grow.

62176176
>>62174951
>What part of Texas is in hell, buddy?
None of it. Texas is God's country. Also, which part of
>You did this to yourself
did you fail to understand?

62176178
>>62176176
tejas is a brown shithole.

62176179
>>62173926
gas was $3.50 and now its $4.50 and thats the reason why your life is falling apart

62176310
>>62176179
yes

62176338
I know who you are OP

62176370
>>62173926
The stock market is at ATH. You lost, tranny

62176398
I really dont know why this is so bad to you. My monthly gas bill went up by like $40. Are you guys really that strapped every month that you cant afford a $40 increase?

62176486
>>62173926
Only trannies and mexicans live in Denver.

62176488
>>62176176
Good god, Texas needs to fix their education system

62176510
Commiefornians flooded your state right before Obummer ran for office, and now you're hurting from it.
> inb4 "TRUMP CAUSED THIS"
Well no shit, point I'm making here is the blue states have even higher gas prices compared to others thanks to outrageous environmentalist laws from the commie mofos.

62176513
>>62173926
It just hit $4 in New Hampshire. Nobody even cares that I am a man trying on woman's clothing in the fitting room anymore. They all sense the same thing.

62176514
>>62173926
Cheap

62176819
>>62174083
> germany makes 0 oil
> germany imports all of its oil and energy
> germany pays out the ass
many such cases

62176841
>>62173926
Everyone at work is complaining about gas. I said "what's the problem?". They all looked at me weird.

Not my problem you losers drive Ford F-350s with $700/mo payments and work is 45 minutes from your house.

62177237
>>62176841
I drive an old camry

62177310
>>62173926
DAMMIT NOW I NEED MORE THAN TREE FIDDY

item.title: POV you’re a junior banker at JP Morgan and your MD wants to have a performance chat — 25 replies — 48.2/hr

Open thread • Replies: 25 • Updated: 2026-05-01 13:35 UTC

OP

POV you’re a junior banker at JP Morgan and your MD wants to have a performance chat

Early replies (first 3)

62173357
>i'm brown in this scenario
Turn it off

62173367
>>62173325
he was a fag right?

62173808
>>62173367
He has a wife.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62173812
GIWTWM

62173890
>>62173812
This is starting to sound like an indian izzat story more and more. Ie fake and gay

62173932
retarded tiktok zoomer
you posted the pov from the MD you fucking retard
FUCK YOU

62173946
>>62173812
Sounds like a fake made by some horny loser.

62174098
>>62173890
>>62173946
So believe women, but don’t believe men?

62174112
>sanjai from new delhi got a job at jpmorgan with fake credentials
>sanjai gets on PIP because he sucks ass
>sanjai wants to save his izzat by accusing the whole floor to sexually harass him
>my dick is not curry flavored ma'am

62174128
>>62174098
I always believe the rapist

62174234
>>62173812
>>62173890
>>62173946
>>>62173170

62174269
>>62173325
I've never seen such a these cannons.

62175166
>>62174098
Don't believe INDIAN men who say that white women are drooling to rapefuck them

62176148
>>62173812
this is literally coomer fanfiction who the fuck actually believes this

62176152
>>62174098
>trusting an indian
HAHAHAHA

62176158
>>62173812
bet she fucks like a fighter jet

62176159
>>62173812
This is so fake it hurts to read

62176185
This is unironically the poopjeet
>SARRRRRRR

62176196
>indian incel writes coomer fanfiction
>forever ruins white stacies reputation

kek

62176199
>>62176185
Looks Italian

62176213
>>62176148
>>62176196
Methinks the cannons doth protest too much

62176254
B...bros?

62176317
>>62173812
LOL. And somehow the fakest part is still that she would be interested in an Indian

62177326
>>62176254
God damn I don't know who's the better asset manager, her or her bra.

62177363
> a performance chat
It is a performance chat, don’t you get what is performance????? As a man you must perform just like a real man. You are stypid brown shit skin.

item.title: Should I sleep with coworkers? — 13 replies — 19.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
Should I sleep with coworkers?

Open thread • Replies: 13 • Updated: 2026-05-01 13:26 UTC

OP

This IS business related, it impacts job prospects and my financial status

TLDR I've blown off three coworkers in 2026 so far and I'm wondering if I should stop being so uptight and create these psychosexual relationships with coworkers.

1) I feel like the drama wouldn't be worth it, and I could be negatively impacted since I'm a man
2) I work at a huge firm, the people I'd tap would have no overlap with my role, meaning they would have no incentive to rat me out in bad faith
3) I do feel like life would be more entertaining if I fucked around
4) I do want a long term relationship, a competent high earning parrner doesnt sound bad at all

Does anonymous of biz have any cautionary tales? Or any words of encouragement? I don't mind it if you just call me a retard, that's valuable input too.

Early replies (first 3)

62177168
>>62177163
No, don't do it. It can be extremely stressful. I fucked my way through nursing staff in my 20's and the kind of people who do this are usually.... Not the most mentally healthy or emotionally mature people.

62177170
>>62177163
id OovNkDoo, dog picture? Are you scooby's horndog cousin?
You shouldn't shit where you eat. Measuring their worth as a potential long term partner is another matter, though if they want to sleep with you right off the bat they're probably not a good candidate. I think you're right to avoid it.

62177177
>>62177163
if you're a wagie working some bullshit service industry job yeah whatever go for it. if you have a white collar career track job, don't do it. you'll probably get fired and the job market is horrendous.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62177190
didn't read tbqh but yes
you can always get a new job who gives a fuck

62177192
>>62177163
There are so many things that could go wrong.

62177198
youre gonna catch feelings and cry like a bitch in a year when she fucks around and cucks you HARD. joke of the floor you work on. stick to friend zoning them. you still get the validation knowing you can fuck them, and you actually cuck them by fucking other women in front of them. ( i mean chatting up and pulling these hoes when out with your female coworkers.) dont shit where you eat anon, that drama is what women live for, you have no idea, things you dont give a fuck about are everything to them...

62177201
>>62177163
>>62177177
People (used to) get married to coworkers at "white collar" jobs all the time.
In fact, work was the second most common place to meet your partner, for people out of school. Just out of school, and older.
Before everyone became a smartphone zombie, that is.

It's your job to judge whether the opposite side is worth it, or if they are out of their mind and have the brain of a moody teenager.

PS: The real logistical problem is actually working in an environment with enough women, who are worth the attention.

62177204
>>62177163
Yeah it'll fuck you over. The minute it helps one of these crazy bitches she'll claim assault. Or she'll blackmail you for it. Even if she doesn't you'll have to worry about it at one point or another. Not worth it.

62177213
i kind of remember what it was like to be this horny that this is how you think and what you think about constantly quite honestly it's fuckin hilarious that you're this screwed, literally enslaved by your own brain

62177215
>>62177177
I work in an office environment in finance, Im young and in a low level position, shouldve mentioned that.

>>62177190
I was thinking about this too, I dont think Ill have trouble finding my way around, plus I have savings

>>62177198
I'm not so worried about that... the drama part is scary, I dont trust women not to spill the beans on the office floor. But what is the worst that can happen?

62177224
I regret not fucking the older tall leggy blonde who wanted me to creampie her when I was 22 and working some bullshit low tier office job.
I am 41 now and still think about it often and regret not doing it.

62177239
>>62177213
Not much I can do about it pal. I am young. I ended a 4 year long relationship where we had great sex every day ~10 months ago. I cant wait for my sexdrive to go down but until then, what else can I do but enjoy the ride?

62177324
>>62177215
where else are you going to meet women? Everyone is always so 'busy' and in their own world. And fuck being a slave to your workspace. At worst you'll have a funny story about how you had to find a new job.

item.title: I have a new coworker at my blue collar job. — 4 replies — 16.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
I have a new coworker at my blue collar job.

Open thread • Replies: 4 • Updated: 2026-05-01 14:04 UTC

OP

I have a new coworker at my blue collar job. We work on computerized high voltage systems. He apparently has an EE degree but our job is very much more maintenance focused and he is, quite frankly, lost. Another sticking point is that the official procedures we are supposed to follow are mostly bullshit desu.
He also is legacy US Chinese and obviously autistic.
Saying something like "Well the procedure says this but what *I* do to achieve the same goals is ..." just flies over his head unless you really hammer it home.
The biggest issue is that he wants to try to solve every little issue that comes up, even when we tell him that that's either something that we, the senior techs, know will never change; or that the thing he has an issue with is literally part of the job he signed up for.
Basically how do I deal with an autist who is over-educated and inexperienced?
Pic unrelated

Early replies (first 3)

62177365
>>62177347
>something that we, the senior techs, know will never change
Tbqh from the outside sounds like you guys have the issue here. If there's something that's inherently confusing and held together by tribal knowledge you should fix this.

>or that the thing he has an issue with is literally part of the job he signed up for
That's on him. Just be clear

Anyway get drunk the fucker and break down barriers is my suggestion.

62177405
>>62177365
Tribal knowledge is exactly one of the issues. How do you pass that to someone who seemingly has to be first taught that I, as a senior employee, can only hint at what what he should actually be focusing on.

62177415
>>62177347
He will either learn to listen or he won't. It is a common problem among new grad engineers that they discount tribal knowledge in favor of textbook knowledge. They will usually figure out how wrong they are, given the chance. If he's autistic he might not. I'd give it 3 months for him to either figure it out or be fired.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62177459
what the fuck is legacy US chinese...is that like a descendant of a railroad worker

62177474
>>62177347
>>62177365
>>62177415
>>62177365
>>62177459
Unskilled laborers on here love to make their job sound more complex than it really is. You can tell they're putting on a facade. Hope a Mexican takes OPs job

item.title: The entire US economy right now is 7 companies sending a trillion fake dollars back and forth to each other and the fed… — 12 replies — 10.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
The entire US economy right now is 7 companies sending a trillion fake dollars back and forth to each other and the fed…

Open thread • Replies: 12 • Updated: 2026-05-01 12:56 UTC

OP

The entire US economy right now is 7 companies sending a trillion fake dollars back and forth to each other and the fed market buying their stocks every morning

Early replies (first 3)

62175966
I'm part of the US economy, and I don't participate in any of those companies. Cope.

62175985
>>62175960
don't forget bombing stuff. we can also bomb stuff. so, you can also apply to defense sector jobs if you're American but cut back on the gummies before your piss test

62175994
>>62175960
If Warsh has a single testicle anywhere in his body he’ll taper the fed overnight at end the American Empire forever

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62176017
>>62175960
You are supposed to make money from this and buy gold to hedge against the inevitable collapse.

62176606
>>62175960
Yeah. Everybody knows that. And your point is?

62176801
>>62176017
Don't tell them the secret plan.

62176814
Look I get that it's fake
But if we had all bought Sandisk 1 year ago we'd be millionaires now

62176817
>>62176814
never heard of it!

62176820
>>62176814
But we all bought it. And we told you. Why didn't you listen?

62176821
>>62175960
There's tons of actual revenue, ai just isn't profitable yet because of high costs. FAGMAN can subsidize it for a while because they're the most cash-rich companies on the planet, don't expect it to end quickly.

62177200
Insider here. Opus 4.7 and mythos are actually dumber than Opus 4.6 for programming tasks. We've maybe hit a wall for LLM agents when it comes to specific work getting done though they will likely still get "smarter" when it comes to general knowledge.

62177220
>>62175960
This isn't new. The economy is always held up by top 7-10 companies driving the bulk of economic output.

item.title: siriusly bros — 9 replies — 9.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
siriusly bros

Open thread • Replies: 9 • Updated: 2026-05-01 13:09 UTC

OP

we had the PC, Internet, Smartphone, and then Bitcoin and AI.. each wave stripped out gatekeepers and reshaped entire industries.
If Bitcoin is disrupting money itself the way the Internet disrupted information, what’s the next layer to fall?

What’s the next asymmetric play that’s still early, still ignored, and actually changes the base layer of how things work?

Early replies (first 3)

62176136
>>62176117
Robots reaching the level of adroitness of a Walmart wagie combined with AI about as good as it is today. It's fucking Joever then.

>Walmart wagie
>McSlop bowl assembly, most food prep
>Door dash
>Amazon slop shoveler
>Uber driver
>Warehouse employees
>Most customer service people

At that point tens of millions of people run out of anything valuable to do. And that's when government dollar collapse and people get hungry and angry. Hopefully you have a compound at that point and can afford armed robosentries

62176154
how did having a phone in your hand ot make tiktoks and youtube videos 'disrupted' dosiety

62176208
>>62176117
>Bitcoin is disrupting money itself
Schizo.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62176495
>>62176117
data is still in its infancy
>still not encrypted by default
>still taking a long time to encode/decode
>still taking a lot of space
>still slow to validate

62176545
>>62176136
> people get hungry and angry
Fuck them.
There is also definitely some fuckery happening in the market these past weeks and it will definitely devalue the dollar and cause inflation

62176681
Genetic engineering. CRISPR baby already won the Olympics

62176826
>>62176117
>If Bitcoin is disrupting money itself the way the Internet disrupted information

62176866
i am disappoint

62177264
>>62176117
Who is that snu snu beast? Is that AI?

item.title: >2000s: get a degree > get a job, don't be dumb > climb the ladder, skill and salary correlate linearly, skills ? — 4 replies — 9.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>2000s: get a degree > get a job, don't be dumb > climb the ladder, skill and salary correlate linearly, skills ?

Open thread • Replies: 4 • Updated: 2026-05-01 13:40 UTC

OP

>2000s: get a degree > get a job, don't be dumb > climb the ladder, skill and salary correlate linearly, skills ? Basic computer literacy, unions still kinda matter, housing ? Work for 3-5 years. Overall, linear and predictable, RPG progression
>2010s post-2008 recovery: Get a degree > get an internship > Make big money, Digital transformation = Gig economy booming + mobility, Housing ? Hard ro affordable in big cities unless you worked in tech, Small cities still acceptable. Overall, system rewards high risk, less guidance
>2020s Post-AI: get a degree > get a masters degree > never find a job. Labor and skill positive correlation to salary weakness significantly. Expected to work longer, KPI overload. Competition ? Everyone and their grandma has a degree, the indians that took your jobs remotely are your neighbors, Housing ? 7.14 times the median annual household income
Its all so hopeless

Early replies (first 3)

62177193
>>62176589
I have been coding for 15 years and have never been unemployed for more than 2 months. You are just retared / useless.

62177248
>>62177193
>I entered a niche in the job market while the economy wasn't crashing or stagnating!
>This means everyone can get a career
>You aren't trying hard enough you useless eater!
>Lift yourself up by your bootstraps, kiddo.
Notice that OP wasnt talking about "coding" but this faggot made it all about his career and himself.
If you tried entering the job market during the reign of pic rel you have probably seen all the bullshit already and earned the right to complain. The jobs only got worse and fewer in number so the hiring process and actual jobs are both worse now.
I pity anyone looking for a job right now.

62177260
>>62177193
Just because you are insulated from a problem doesnt mean it doesnt exist, boomer.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62177379
>62177193
This sort of bait is just so tiring

item.title: Charizard > HAWK — 2 replies — 8.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Charizard > HAWK

Open thread • Replies: 2 • Updated: 2026-05-01 14:05 UTC

OP

You could have purchased Pokémon cards instead of getting rug pulled on a shitcoin.

Early replies (first 3)

62177375
>>62177352
grown men trying to offload their plastic bing bing wahoos onto unsuspecting children who think it's a "hobby" is hilarious

62177465
>>62177352
A girl I work with has a side business selling pokemon cards. Annually, she makes more money from that than her salary.
We work in fucking finance.
I pray for the bubble to pop just for the world to make sense again.

62177475
>>62177352
>The world has devolved to the point where grown men are trading toys for money
Uncle Ted was right this whole time.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

item.title: Woman JP Morgan executive Rapes and turns Male Employee into sex slave — 137 replies — 121.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
Woman JP Morgan executive Rapes and turns Male Employee into sex slave

Open thread • Replies: 137 • Updated: 2026-05-01 12:59 UTC

OP

https://x.com/dailymail/status/2049618941043949691?s=46

A white woman JP Morgan Executive (mega international bank) drugged and raped a married man before taking pictures of him to use as blackmail.

She would force him to take drugs like viagra so she could fuck him longer. She started buying him gifts which as sex toys including anal ones which she forced him to use and got him a position where she had direct control over him and he acted as her assistant. She also pegged him.

He was crying over the situation and talking to authorities who didn’t believe him.

She was caught when police investigated her for ties to Trump and Epstein with her blackmailing the employee being unclassified.

Early replies (first 3)

62172413
>>62172412

62172414
>>62172413
kek

62172420
>>62172413
post her tits are they big and nice?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62175813
>>62172412
the story is fake, the guy is indian

62175827
>>62175811
>>62175813
Erhm says who? The accused's lawyer? What did you expect him to say?

62175832
>>62175827
it's heuristically obvious the story is fake because the guy is indian. you are indian

62175844
>>62175813
This.

Anyone who has ever dealt with Jeets knows they lie and scam like this.

62176074
>>62173170
winrar

I feel like I read this story before... timeline bros?

62176111
giwtwm...

62176126
>>62172413
so this took place at his house? where was his wife?

62176236
Bros...i need an albanian wife who sits on my face nightly

62176255
>>62175043
she's in a male-dominated space because she acts like a man

62176674
APOLOGIZE

62176678
jeets unironically think life is like a porno

62176680
>>62172412
Shoulda punched her, killed her, but "that's not civilized" so the frustrated man lost. This is a silly new story.

62176682
>>62175811
the second I saw his photo I knew it was fake

62176704
>>62176682
The moment I read that at least his feet don't smell like curry or some other comment in the allegations, there was no way.

62176816
Why the fuck did the guy report his fantasies as reality? Did he think he could speak them into existence? Lmfaooo holy shit. Dudes about to lose his job and his wife when it comes out he fabricated everything

62176825
>>62176816
turns out he doesnt have a wife either

62176949
For anyone checking in, the story was fake made up by a jeet who probably got fired. Internal investigation by JP morgan showed no evidence of anything happening within the buildings where this woman worked. She didn't even know him.

62176953
>>62172412
Based

62176970
>>62176949
She did know him and he tried to do an internal complaint but then refused to actually answer any questions when the company investigated LMAO

62176973
>>62175043
I use it all the time and now I’m sad that I can’t go to warosu and search “fish head” and see exclusively my posts now

62176986
>>62176674
Smoke show

62176988
>>62176674
Look at those assets
No wonder she works at a bank

62176994
>>62175043
she's albanian not white

62176996
>>62175827
When the bank says there's nothing there that's pretty bad.
Also he's Indian so it's clearly fanfiction.

62177044
>>62174634
>>62174688
Basically this, it was a jeet writing his own fanfiction on his laptop but he forgot to delete them before they were checked out by LEO

62177061
>>62172448
dudes, i've never felt so abandoned by god as i do in this moment

62177089
>>62172412
what the fuck is wrong with this faggot? if this shit happened me i'd quit my job to solely be her live in fuckmeat. i'd do all the weird nasty shit she'd be into as well like huffing her farts in a gas mask.

>>During the second encounter, Hajdini allegedly ordered him to suck her toes, pushed him to the ground and sat on his face, berating him when he was unable to sustain arousal.

I don't even like toes either dude but you'd bet your fucking ass i'd be cleaning every grain of dirt off of those fucking things and smelling the fuck out of them. fucking loser faggot

62177151
lmao this is exactly how Indians think white women are. It's so obvious that it's jeet delusions

62177156
>>62177089
This is all pajeet bullshit lies. Why would you trust anyone who shits in the street.

62177231
>>62172412

item.title: Half of datacenter projects getting cancelled — 7 replies — 7.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
Half of datacenter projects getting cancelled

Open thread • Replies: 7 • Updated: 2026-05-01 13:13 UTC

OP

I told you idiots this was going to happen. These AI TechBros aren't going to be able to force 80% of the U.S. population to live in unpowered, unlit, unheated caves just so they can suck up all the DRAM and GPUs to generate tentacle porn images.

https://www.zerohedge.com/markets/here-come-cancellations-brookfield-backed-compass-pulls-out-major-northern-virginia-data

> Recall days ago we wrote that half of US data centers scheduled for 2026 would be cancelled or delayed. We wrote then that the outlook for the US AI revolution looks increasingly more dim.
>
>The data, which comes from Sightline Climate's 2026 Data Center Outlook, suggests that just 30% - 50% of the ~16 GW of planned US capacity for the year will face risks, with only ~5 GW currently under construction!
>
> According to the article, "things get even dodgier in the coming years, with the vast majority of data centers planned for launch between 2028 and 2032 having yet to even break ground. There are a further 37 gigawatts of planned infrastructure which haven’t even received a firm completion date, only 4.5 [gigawatts] of which have actually begun work."

Early replies (first 3)

62176991
>>62176967
>zerohedge
inverse this stupid gay bear shit

62176999
>>62176967
already priced in the moment they were announced and I mean that unironically. these fucks at wall street are smarter than you. dont pretend you have more information/insider knowledge than them. you are a random faggot on the internet. no move one

62177000
>zerohedge

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62177038
>>62176991
Seethe harder.

>>62177000
Nice full house, but seethe harder anyway.

62177046
>>62176967
spray data center agents in the face with DMSO solubilized carfentanil

62177103
>>62176967
>New algorithms massively improve efficiency
>AGI achieved with current datacenters
>Cancelling those unneeded datacenters saves tens of trillions of dollars making AI even more profitable
>this is somehow le bad

62177278
>>62176967
zerohed saaar! ai is bestest thing since slice bread benchod!

item.title: Reorganize my stock portfolio — 16 replies — 7.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
Reorganize my stock portfolio

Open thread • Replies: 16 • Updated: 2026-05-01 12:03 UTC

OP

I currently have 33,000 usd invested into my stock portfolio. I want to have a lottery ticket to 5x. Here is the best I have found so far to share with all of you.

Which one of my stocks are most likely to skyrocket and which ones would you recommend I drop off my portfolio to reallocate my other stocks listed here or into literally anything else?

1. Jack in the box
2. Snapchat
3. Dave and Busters
4. Sixflags
5. FMC

Early replies (first 3)

62176562
What's your reasoning for these five? And what's your track record? If you're not just investing in an index fund, you should have a very compelling reason to start picking and choosing stocks. Imagine an informed trader on the other side of the trade, selling to you because they think the stock is lousy. Why is that trader wrong?

62176568
>>62176562
The economy is in the absolute shitter right now, with inflation and oil at all time highs. My catalyst is that when the war ends and oil prices drop back down that these 5 stocks will go up. Snapchat is likely to catapult because they are going from net negative to net positive profits from using ai to cut down on operating costs. There is a global famine so FMC is the ideal fertilizer stock since its already beaten down severely.

62176645
>>62176557
>>62176568
You are retarded just buy Bitcoin

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62176657
>>62176645
Crypto currency is retarded, come on now. There is no reason to buy bitcoin at these prices. Maybe if it crashed to below 50k it would be worth slurping. What a thoughtless post.

62176667
>>62176557
All in GME, thank me next month

62176688
>>62176568
if i knew id get a chick in picrel id never stop working for a single second.

62176689
>>62176657
>slurping
i hope you never make it

62176692
To my eyes we're entering a resource war, so I have a selection of rare resources, gold, silver, tungsten, copper, neodymium, stable magnets etc

USAR did 18% yesterday, so that was nice

62176703
Zoomete suck my dick passionately

62176960
>>62176667
>random twitter screencap of a course seller using the 'Dick and Balls Tracheotomy' method to figure out the next pump and dump
NGMI

62177010
you are going to lose 33,000 dollars.

62177049
Amrize, Novo, Red Cat

62177053
>>62176568
anon you are not ozymandias, just buy soxl and nvidia like everyone else.

62177090
No one uses Snapchat anymore lilbro

62177091
>>62176568
>FMC is the ideal fertilizer stock since its already beaten down severely.
you are dumb
the ideal fertilizer stocks are CF, IPI, and NTR (in that order)
CF is most important since they sell nitrogen fertilizers like urea and ammonia

62177094
>>62176692

item.title: That's it. I'm going all in on US oil/gas. — 10 replies — 6.1/hr

Open thread • Replies: 10 • Updated: 2026-05-01 12:28 UTC

OP

That's it. I'm going all in on US oil/gas.

Early replies (first 3)

62176779
>>62176768
My fav countersignal board <3
World peqce today!

62176782
>>62176768
You are way too late. It's priced in already

62176786
Congress is voting tomorrow on if we'll continue the two day operation

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62176789
>>62176782
see you when XOM breaks $200

62176790
>>62176789
At least buy USO not XOM

62176810
I pay for the increase in gas with a us oil gas fund. My shares in oil rise and I take out money every week from my fund to pay at the pump. The pattern continues!

62176834
bicycles are going to the moon

62177122
>>62176768
Good for you. Every fund needs exit liquidity at the top.

62177124
>>62176786
Again? They've voted on it three times already. Not that it matters, because this is a naval operation, and naval matters aren't subject to the blatantly unconstitutional WPA.

62177148
>>62176786
The White House already declared they're going to ignore the War Powers Act, with the excuse that the April 8 ceasefire meant the 60 day timer went back to zero. Republicans in Congress don't want their votes to be on record authorizing the war, so they won't force the issue. Thus, there will be no vote.

item.title: >tfw fell for the NEET meme how the fuck can you guys endure this? — 116 replies — 6.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
>tfw fell for the NEET meme how the fuck can you guys endure this?

Open thread • Replies: 116 • Updated: 2026-04-30 19:11 UTC

OP

>tfw fell for the NEET meme
how the fuck can you guys endure this? it's so boring and depressing, I unironically miss my wagecuck 9-5

Early replies (first 3)

62156768
I would unironically wagecuck still if I was able to take vacation whenever I want. I don't enjoyed scheduling things like that or requiring permission.

62156775
>>62156751
I became a neet because of crippling social anxiety, not out of choice.
I suspect many are the same.

62156779
>>62156751
see you fell for it without having any money, I did that once and then realized that it costs money to do anything other than sit in front of a screen all day every day

Depending on where you live, even going out for a walk will cost you bus fare or gas to get to a decent park. Never felt so trapped, now if I had money to go out and do things like camping or fishing or even just cook nice meals then I would have been a lot happier

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62164460
>NEETs when you ask them to show you some of the art and projects they "have time to create since they're not a slave like you"

62164470
>>62164460
i've beaten my favorite game nearly 5 times in the past month and wrote some genderbent DEI thot getting raped and mindbroken
how 'bout u?

62164922
>>62156751
simple i wasn't born a slave with a pink id

62165197
>>62164460
Is it so difficult to grasp why somebody who isn't compelled to conform to working their whole life is also not compelled to try and impress somebody who is?

62165794
>>62156775
yeah i never had a job because i keep sperging out in the few interviews i get

62165803
>>62164460
I just feel bad for their Mom's more than anything.

62165810
>>62157256
AI is based and does the stupid shit I don't want to do
sucks for the accountants that get left out, great for the ones that survive. Bookkeepers / entry level on suicide watch.

62166342
>>62156871
hobbies cost money

62166357
>>62164460
Why would I need to prove you how productive I am. I could rest an entire life and it wouldnt change much about the superiority of the NEET lifestyle.

62166361
>>62156751
Back when I was a neet many years ago I felt like such a god damn loser during the week when all the wagies were off waging. It was pretty bad for my psyche. Looking back those were some of the best days of my life. Especially when I had some good weed. Getting high, smoking cigs, and playing black ops. Fuck those were the glory days

62166616
>>62165197
>>62166357

62166678
>>62156751
>I'm bored with my infinite free time with infinite access to infinite materials online
Unironically kill yourself you worthless braindead carbon emitter
You were born to be a spineless barely sentient farm hand who does nothing but work and eat and die alone for someone else but you were born too late even for that

62166894
>>62158971

62166973
>>62166678
So I actually use the internet to achive productive things. Did research on drones and electric bikes. None of this matters if you have no money to follow through.

62167037
>>62163096
>cured me but dick no longer works
This is me with tramadol.

62167148
>>62164118
>electrical engineering student
unless you are working on boner inducing projects or at an ivy league, i suggest changing majors. these jeets are taking all the jobs

t. EE

62168741
>>62166894
>Got paid $12k to speak at a university
Boomers really did have it easy
Insane how many more opportunities old people have compared to the current generation

62168749
>>62156751
>how the fuck can you guys endure this? it's so boring and depressing, I unironically miss my wagecuck 9-5
You're a failed normie and you're not mentally wired for long term NEET life. Not really saying this to attack you, but it's true. Long term NEETs need some schizoid adjacent type condition, not just any anon can do this, despite a lot having been meme'd into it.

Go back to normie life. It's psychologically necessary for you, it's not a retreat or act of cucking.

62168769
>>62156751
Are you financially set? Can you live off your investments? Big difference between a broke and a rich neet, even between a modest and a poor one. I'm a poor semi-neet (part-time shitty job) and sometimes I genuinely want to kill myself, but mostly because I'm broke.

62171342
>>62156751
>Oy vey, NEETing is bad, understand!!?? Waging is good.

62171475
>>62156751
I would love to join the NEET game, get a hobby, join a club. Make your home cooler. Develop a skill for fun, even if it's just a particular video game.

You sound like the faggots who want wfh to end just because you're bored/boring or hate your home life.
Don't be that kind of faggot.

62172015
I got the job and am still a sexless anti social.
What now?

62172051
Basketball American NEETS have vibrant social lives. You are just a boring loser with or without a job.

62172174
>>62156871
this
>>62159344
so just be bored for a few hours you overstimulated faggot

62172195
>>62156751
Honestly OP, if you don't invest your time in passive income from social media you're retarded.
Generating content for stupid children or boomers is easier than ever, and with no apparent hobbies why not develop passive income streams

62172363
>>62171342
The amount of retards like this that unironically think that not NEETing aka being in work, education, or training is somehow a jewish scheme is proof that we need to cull the weak and comfortable.
100 years ago there was no disability from the government. Hell, even 60 years ago.
Your ancestors worked much more for much less. They absolutely did complain, you will never hear that but no one in history is content. Only NEETS are content. Being content means giving up on living.
Hardly any true NEETs exist, and hardly any would need to be killed/exercised. But those who do are far gone and deserve death, for they are not living.

62173517
>>62172363
False
There have always been beggars who chill all day.

62174847
teat

62174907
>>62165197
>>62166357
Lol

62174925
>>62166361
This was me too. I was supposed to feel bad I didn’t have a job in my 20s and was living at home.
Now I retired at 28 and realized why it id called the rat races. It is for rodents.
